'''lodhafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nuanceless|nuanceless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nuanceless|nuanceless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lodhafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhafithi|lodhafithi]] || [[word:lodhafiji|lodhafiji]] || [[word:lodhafishi|lodhafishi]] || [[word:lodhafiki|lodhafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhafuthuthu|lodhafuthuthu]] || [[word:lodhafujuju|lodhafujuju]] || [[word:lodhafushushu|lodhafushushu]] || [[word:lodhafukuku|lodhafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhafuthu|lodhafuthu]] || [[word:lodhafuju|lodhafuju]] || [[word:lodhafushu|lodhafushu]] || [[word:lodhafuku|lodhafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhafufthuf|lodhafufthuf]] || [[word:lodhafufjuf|lodhafufjuf]] || [[word:lodhafufshuf|lodhafufshuf]] || [[word:lodhafufkuf|lodhafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhafethe|lodhafethe]] || [[word:lodhafeje|lodhafeje]] || [[word:lodhafeshe|lodhafeshe]] || [[word:lodhafeke|lodhafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhafothotho|lodhafothotho]] || [[word:lodhafojojo|lodhafojojo]] || [[word:lodhafoshosho|lodhafoshosho]] || [[word:lodhafokoko|lodhafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhafotho|lodhafotho]] || [[word:lodhafojo|lodhafojo]] || [[word:lodhafosho|lodhafosho]] || [[word:lodhafoko|lodhafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhafofthof|lodhafofthof]] || [[word:lodhafofjof|lodhafofjof]] || [[word:lodhafofshof|lodhafofshof]] || [[word:lodhafofkof|lodhafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhafïfthïf|lodhafïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfjïf|lodhafïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfshïf|lodhafïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfkïf|lodhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhafïfthïfthïf|lodhafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfjïfjïf|lodhafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfshïfshïf|lodhafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfkïfkïf|lodhafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhafïfthïf|lodhafïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfjïf|lodhafïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfshïf|lodhafïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfkïf|lodhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhafïfthïf|lodhafïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfjïf|lodhafïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfshïf|lodhafïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhafïfkïf|lodhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhafæthæ|lodhafæthæ]] || [[word:lodhafæjæ|lodhafæjæ]] || [[word:lodhafæshæ|lodhafæshæ]] || [[word:lodhafækæ|lodhafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhafathatha|lodhafathatha]] || [[word:lodhafajaja|lodhafajaja]] || [[word:lodhafashasha|lodhafashasha]] || [[word:lodhafakaka|lodhafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhafatha|lodhafatha]] || [[word:lodhafaja|lodhafaja]] || [[word:lodhafasha|lodhafasha]] || [[word:lodhafaka|lodhafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhafafthaf|lodhafafthaf]] || [[word:lodhafafjaf|lodhafafjaf]] || [[word:lodhafafshaf|lodhafafshaf]] || [[word:lodhafafkaf|lodhafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lodhafasha|lodhafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhafshësha|lodhafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhafrosha|lodhafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhafmusha|lodhafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhafyasha|lodhafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhafnkshësha|golodhafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhafnkrosha|golodhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhafnkmusha|golodhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhafnkyasha|golodhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lodhadhafasha|lodhadhafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhadhafshësha|lodhadhafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhadhafrosha|lodhadhafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhadhafmusha|lodhadhafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhadhafyasha|lodhadhafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhadhafnkshësha|golodhadhafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhadhafnkrosha|golodhadhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhadhafnkmusha|golodhadhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhadhafnkyasha|golodhadhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ledhæfasha|ledhæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ledhæfshësha|ledhæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ledhæfrosha|ledhæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ledhæfmusha|ledhæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ledhæfyasha|ledhæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goledhæfnkshësha|goledhæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goledhæfnkrosha|goledhæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goledhæfnkmusha|goledhæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goledhæfnkyasha|goledhæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lodhfafasha|lodhfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhfafshësha|lodhfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhfafrosha|lodhfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhfafmusha|lodhfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhfafyasha|lodhfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhfafnkshësha|golodhfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhfafnkrosha|golodhfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhfafnkmusha|golodhfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhfafnkyasha|golodhfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
